Can you help me with creative writing? I want to write a short story.

Of course! Great storytelling rests on a few key pillars: Character (give your protagonist a clear desire and flaw), Conflict (something must stand between them and their goal), and Stakes (the reader needs to care about the outcome). What genre or setting did you have in mind?

I was thinking a mystery set in a lighthouse. The detective is afraid of water.

That's a wonderful setup! The irony of a hydrophobic detective trapped on a lighthouse island creates built-in tension. You could open in medias res — your detective arriving by boat, knuckles white on the railing, before a body is even discovered.
